server.internal: An error occured on the server, try again later or contact us
server.unauthorized: You are not authorized to do this
server.forbidden: You are not allowed to do this

title.label: Title
title.placeholder: Choose a title for your blind test
title.lengthError: Your title must be between 5 and 50 characters

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: You can describe your blind test
description.lengthError: Your description must be between 5 and 200 characters

list.title: Tracks in my playlist
list.description: You can customize the sounds in your playlist by giving them a title and an artist (you must have at least 10 sounds with at least one title or artist for your blind test to be playable).

search.title: Find a track
search.description: You can search for a YouTube video by its title; only the sound (up to 30 seconds maximum) will be played during the blind tests. You can customize and add a result from your search.

tracksSearch.youtubeError: An error occured while searching on YouTube, please try again later

tracksSearchResult.youtubeError: An error occured while searching on YouTube, please try again later
tracksSearchResult.cardTooltip: Personalize this track and add it to my playlist

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Contact us
contact.description: You can contact us by filling this form. We will answer you as soon as possible.

form.error: An error occured, please try again later

create.label: Create a blind test
create.title: Create a new blind test
create.description: Songs, movie soundtracks, animal sounds, comedians, ... Create a new playlist for Kanisson players.

one.title: Give a title to your blind test
one.description: You can also give it a description

two.title: Add sounds
two.description: Thanks to the YouTube API, you can find them by typing the title of a video (of an artist, a piece of music, etc.) in the field below. You will be able to listen to a sample before adding it to your playlist to ensure that players can recognize your sound.
two.warning: As long as your playlist contains fewer than 10 valid sounds (to be valid, a sound must have at least an artist or a title), it will not be visible to other users.

three.title: That's it !
three.description: You can now share your playlist with all Kanisson users and play with your friends !

heading.linkTooltip: Go to my public profile page

form.usernameDescription: Your account name is not visible by other users, you can add a username. It will be displayed on the site
form.usernameLengthError: Your username must be between 3 and 20 characters
form.profileAlreadyUpToDate: Your profile is already up to date
